latin: Abscede. non es in ludo. tu puerum ludis in mensa virorum. abscede antequam te frango.

questions.prompt: What is the speaker telling someone to do?
questions.target: Back off because they are out of their league
choices: Back off because they are out of their league

questions.prompt: What threat does the speaker make?

translation: Back off. You are not in the game. You are playing a boy at the table of men. Back off before I break you.
